name: Frasers Property (Thailand) Public Company Limited
summary: Frasers Property (Thailand) Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, primarily develops industrial real estate properties in Thailand. The company develops, rents, and sells factories and warehouses, as well as manages 2.8 million square meters of factories and warehouses. It is also involved in the development of commercial and hospitality properties, as well as houses, lands, and mixed-use projects; development of residential properties, including rental and related service of commercial buildings; hotel business; and operation of a golf course. In addition, the company operates and manages serviced apartments, hotels, and office and commercial buildings; and operates as a sponsor and manager of the industrial real estate investment trust in Thailand. Further, it offers data center colocation, smart solutions, investment management, and treasury center development services. The company was formerly known as TICON Industrial Connection Public Company Limited and changed its name to Frasers Property (Thailand) Public Company Limited in January 2019. Frasers Property (Thailand) Public Company Limited was founded in 1990 and is based in Bangkok, Thailand.
